title: Chewy Norwegian Chocolate Bars
description: A quick, sugar‑free, chewy bar that packs high energy with plain dark chocolate and wholesome oats, perfect as a Norwegian snack.
instructions: Melt the chocolate and coconut oil together using a double boiler or microwave, stirring until smooth.
Remove from heat and stir in the erythritol, vanilla extract, and sea salt until dissolved.
Fold in the rolled oats, chopped almonds, and ground flaxseed until fully incorporated.
Press the mixture evenly into a lined 8×8 inch pan, smoothing the top with a spatula.
Place the pan in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes or freeze for 15 minutes to set.
Once firm, lift the slab from the pan and cut into 4 equal bars.
Store the bars in an airtight container in the fridge up to one week or freeze for longer storage.
